fields.panel3_caption: Vatican drops 42,300-word encyclical on Silicon Valley
fields.panel4_caption: God has opinions on your transformer architecture

narrative_summary: The joke escalates from mundane regulatory bodies to the Pope — and ultimately God — weighing in on AI governance, treating the Vatican's unprecedented encyclical as the most cosmic possible flex in the AI policy debate.
rationale: Candidate 5 earns its tie-breaking win on punchline strength — 'God has opinions on your transformer architecture' is the sharpest, most unexpected closing beat, pivoting from institutional escalation to a genuinely funny specific detail (transformer architecture) that rewards the technically literate reader. Candidate 4's '1891' callback is clever but lands as a restatement rather than a true punchline.
place: at the edge of a black hole
hat_pair: top hat with a tiny working cuckoo clock built into the brim
crash helmet with a tiny windshield wiper on the visor
